label_verbatim: FIRST: The name of the corporation is
rationale: Primary corporation name field at top of Articles.

label_verbatim: SECOND: 'X' only if applicable — This is a professional corporation formed pursuant to 13 MRSA Chapter 22-A
rationale: Boolean elect-in for professional-corporation status.

label_verbatim: (type of professional services)
rationale: Free-text description used only when professional-corporation checkbox is set.

label_verbatim: THIRD: 'X' only if applicable — This is a close corporation formed pursuant to 13-C MRSA §1803
rationale: Boolean elect-in for close-corporation status.

label_verbatim: FOURTH: Commercial Clerk — CRA Public Number
rationale: Right-aligned narrow field on Commercial Clerk line.

label_verbatim: (name of commercial clerk)
rationale: Full-width name line; same logical concept regardless of commercial vs noncommercial selection.

label_verbatim: (name of clerk) [under Noncommercial Clerk option]
rationale: Form has separate name line for noncommercial clerk; both populate the same canonical key (filer uses one row based on type).

label_verbatim: (physical location, not P.O. Box - street, city, state and zip code)
rationale: Single-line concatenated address; not split into street/city/state/zip on this form.

label_verbatim: (mailing address if different from above)
rationale: Optional single-line mailing address.

label_verbatim: Commercial Clerk vs Noncommercial Clerk (mutually exclusive)
rationale: Page-null checkbox group; appears to be the Commercial/Noncommercial radio. Enum values: 'commercial' | 'noncommercial'.

label_verbatim: SIXTH: There shall only be one class of shares. The number of authorized shares is ___
rationale: Inline numeric blank on the single-class option.

label_verbatim: (Optional) Name of class:
rationale: Optional class label for the single-class election.

label_verbatim: SIXTH alt: ...is set forth in Exhibit __ attached hereto
rationale: Tiny inline blank for the Exhibit letter referenced when multi-class option is elected.

label_verbatim: SIXTH: one class vs two-or-more classes (mutually exclusive)
rationale: Page-null checkbox appears to back the SIXTH radio. Enum: 'single_class' | 'multi_class'.

label_verbatim: SEVENTH: Board of Directors vs no directors (mutually exclusive)
rationale: Page-null checkbox appears to back the SEVENTH radio. Boolean (true=board, false=managed by shareholders per 13-C MRSA §743).

label_verbatim: EIGHTH: [X] The number of directors is limited as follows
rationale: Opt-in checkbox enabling the min/max blanks.

label_verbatim: not fewer than __ nor more than
rationale: Inline numeric — minimum directors.

label_verbatim: nor more than __ directors
rationale: Inline numeric — maximum directors.

label_verbatim: EIGHTH: [X] To the fullest extent permitted by 13-C MRSA §202.2.D, a director shall have no liability
rationale: Opt-in for §202.2.D liability shield.

label_verbatim: EIGHTH: [X] Except as otherwise specified by contract or in its bylaws, the Corporation shall in all cases provide indemnification
rationale: Opt-in for mandatory indemnification under 13-C MRSA §§202, 857, 859.

label_verbatim: NINTH: [X] The Corporation elects to have preemptive rights as defined in 13-C MRSA §641
rationale: Boolean elect-in for preemptive rights.

label_verbatim: TENTH: [X] Additional provisions of these Articles of Incorporation are set forth in Exhibit __
rationale: Boolean opt-in indicating an additional-provisions exhibit is attached.

label_verbatim: Exhibit __ attached hereto and made a part hereof (TENTH)
rationale: Inline exhibit letter for TENTH.

label_verbatim: ELEVENTH: ...set forth on Exhibit __ attached hereto
rationale: Inline exhibit letter for ELEVENTH (additional incorporators list).

label_verbatim: Dated ____
rationale: Date the filing was signed by the incorporator.

label_verbatim: *By ____ (original written signature) / (type or print name of incorporator)
rationale: Single text field on the signature row; PDF doesn't separate signature widget from print-name. Treating as printed name (signatures are typically rendered as image elsewhere).

label_verbatim: Name of entity(s) on the submitted filings [1]
rationale: First entity name on cover-letter; supports multi-form bundling.

widget_id: Name of entitys on the submitted filings 2
label_verbatim: Name of entity [2]
rationale: Second entity name on cover-letter (multi-form bundle).

label_verbatim: Hold attested copy for pick up at our office in Augusta, Maine
rationale: Mutually-exclusive expedited-service option = 'hold_for_pickup' (no fee).

label_verbatim: 24-hour expedited filing (next business day) service: $50 additional filing fee per entity
rationale: Mutually-exclusive expedited-service option = '24h_next_business_day'.

label_verbatim: Immediate expedited filing (same business day): $100 additional filing fee per entity
rationale: Mutually-exclusive expedited-service option = 'immediate_same_day'.

label_verbatim: Total fee(s) enclosed: $
rationale: Dollar amount enclosed by filer.

label_verbatim: (Name of contact person)
rationale: Contact for filing-related questions.

label_verbatim: (Daytime telephone number)
rationale: Daytime phone for the filing contact.

widget_id: Contact email address for this filing
label_verbatim: (Contact email address for this filing)
rationale: Per-filing contact email.

widget_id: Email address to use for annual report reminders
label_verbatim: (Email address to use for annual report reminders)
rationale: Persistent recurring-reminder email — distinct from per-filing contact email.

label_verbatim: Name and address of person to return the attested copy of the completed filing — (Name of attested copy recipient)
rationale: Recipient for the returned attested copy.

label_verbatim: (Firm or Company)
rationale: Firm/company associated with attested-copy recipient.

label_verbatim: (Mailing Address)
rationale: Street/mailing line for attested-copy recipient.

label_verbatim: (City, State & Zip)
rationale: Single-line city/state/zip; form doesn't split components.
